project.name: voxlblade-builder
project.description: Svelte 5 + Vite + TypeScript damage calculator for Voxel Blade RPG with weapon calculations, enchantments, perks, and draconic rune system

layers.name: Entry & Shell
layers.description: Application entry point, root layout, global styles, and build configuration

layers.name: UI Components
layers.description: Reusable Svelte UI components — buttons, cards, badges, modals, stat displays, toasts, search/autocomplete, filter panels, headers, icons, and tooltips

layers.name: Damage Analyzer
layers.description: Primary damage analysis orchestrator component that wires together all game systems, defense resolution, and UI presentation

layers.name: Game Engine
layers.description: Core game calculation logic: weapon computation, enchantments, shrine boosts, defense resolution, damage type resolution, crit system, and utility math

layers.name: Data Layer
layers.description: Game data definitions and computation functions for perks, runes, DoT, weapon arts, mounts, buffs/debuffs, race effects, self-damage, stat boosts, draconic system, CDR, enemy HP effects, and stance overlays

layers.name: Constants & Config
layers.description: Numeric tuning constants for game balance (boosts, defense, damage types, draconic, CDR, DoT, thresholds, stat conversions, storage keys) and project configuration files

tour.title: Project Overview
tour.description: Start with the README and package.json to understand that this is a Svelte 5 + Vite + TypeScript damage calculator for the Voxel Blade RPG. Note the key dependencies and scripts.

tour.title: Entry Point & App Shell
tour.description: See how the app boots: main.ts mounts App.svelte, which sets up global styles (app.css) and renders the DamageAnalyzer as the main view.

tour.title: Type System & Data Models
tour.description: Understand the foundational TypeScript types — StatKey, Race, Guild, Armor, WeaponBlade, Enchantment, BuildState, and damage result types that flow through the entire engine.

tour.title: Game Engine Core
tour.description: The engine layer wires together weapon computation, enchantment application, shrine boosts, defense resolution, crit calculation, and damage type resolution. Start with engine.ts and explore the sub-modules.

tour.title: Game Data Definitions
tour.description: All game content lives in src/data: perk damage tables, rune definitions, heal boosts, DoT damage, draconic buffs, stat boosts, weapon arts, race effects, summon data, and more.

tour.title: Damage Analyzer — The Main Orchestrator
tour.description: DamageAnalyzer.svelte is the heart of the UI. It pulls together all engine calculations, defense resolution, and renders the full damage breakdown. This is where data meets presentation.

tour.title: UI Components & Modals
tour.description: Reusable UI primitives (Badge, Button, Card, Panel, Stat, Section) in src/lib/ui, plus specialized components like EnchantSelect, WeaponStatsDisplay, BuffList, and modal dialogs for Race, Guild, and Weapon selection.

tour.title: Constants, Config & Build
tour.description: Game balance tuning lives in src/lib/constants (boosts, defense, damage types, draconic, CDR, DoT, stat conversions). The project builds with Vite and deploys to Vercel.
